raw_consumer_statement:
There were three unauthorized charges on my account from XXXX car wash. Two of them were from XX/XX/year> for {$24.00} and {$19.00}, and one from XX/XX/year> for {$24.00}. I contacted them and they reversed the transactions from XX/XX/year>. Per XXXX car wash, they did not charge the transaction on XX/XX/year> for {$24.00}. I contacted the credit card customer service of Barclays at XXXX on XX/XX/year> to dispute a transaction of {$24.00} from XXXX car wash, which was not even charged by XXXX. 

Out of the three charges XXXX had refunded me two of them ( {$24.00} and {$19.00} charged on XX/XX/year> ). Barclays had initially credited me the third charge of {$24.00} ( charged on XX/XX/year> ) and they reversed it the next day. This was actually never charged by XXXX ( as per XXXX ). So I have never received that third charge of {$24.00} from XX/XX/year>. Now it has grown to a huge amount with late charges and finance charge and it has reflected on my credit score. I don't even know the actual amount now as I closed this account. 

Hope this help you understand the situation which was never understood by Barclays. If any questions, please don't hesitate to contact me. Hoping for a reasonable resolution. 
With regards,
